pi_items.source: setup_task.sh python bookmark generation and spec document

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated Chrome environment initialized by setup_task.sh. It was verified that the expected prepress spool directory is '/home/ga/Documents/Prepress_Spool', the required GPU flags are 'enable-gpu-rasterization' and 'ignore-gpu-blocklist', and the requested bookmark folder hierarchy correctly expects 'Web-to-Print MIS', 'Color Management', 'Asset Libraries', and 'Equipment Support'. Furthermore, the banned domains (netflix.com, facebook.com, espn.com, x.com, twitter.com, hulu.com) directly match the personal bookmarks artificially injected into the browser via a Python setup script, and the target custom site search for 'color' securely resolves to the 'pantone.com/color-finder' endpoint as outlined in the generated specification document.
